amendment.description: To support the work performed by the Immigration Detention Ombudsman.

action.text: Amendment SA 5803 ruled out of order by the chair.
Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5803, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 46 - 53. Record Vote Number: 150.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 302(f) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5803.
Amendment SA 5803 proposed by Senator Booker to Amendment SA 5453. To support the work performed by the Immigration Detention Ombudsman.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5803, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 46 - 53. Record Vote Number: 150.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5803 proposed by Senator Booker to Amendment SA 5453.
